name: superdev
description: Superdev — a workspace-scope-agnostic, package-manager-agnostic, self-improving Claude Code plugin bundling 18 skills and 54 subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. v1.8.0 adds production-readiness-audit: an iterative loop that scores every module 1–10 across five passes and loops fix→re-audit until all are 9+, with real seed data + initial user, a tenancy-leak test, and exhaustive Playwright (every route/form/data-shape FE+BE). v1.7.0 makes completion enforced via a machine-checkable Definition-of-Done Stop gate, a stack-aware lint/suppression wave gate, and a self-learning loop that actually fires. v1.4.0–v1.6.0 add a Laravel/Inertia backend option selectable via orchestrator stack gates.

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: 18 production-grade skills + 54 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic. Self-improving via .claude/memory/superdev-learned/. v1.8.0 adds production-readiness-audit: an iterative loop that scores EVERY module 1–10 across five passes (completeness/wiring, data+seed, tenancy-isolation, exhaustive Playwright over every route/form/data-shape FE+BE, code-quality/security with zero suppressions) and loops fix→re-audit until every module is 9+ — requiring real seed data + an initial owner/admin user and a tenancy-leak test, and writing gates.readiness + per-module readiness_score into the ledger. v1.7.0 makes completion ENFORCED: a Definition-of-Done Stop gate (done-gate.sh + COMPLETION_LEDGER.json + superdev-done skill) blocks any premature 'done'; the wave gate blocks lint errors + new suppressions and is stack-aware (TS tsc/eslint + Laravel Pint/PHPStan/Pest); the self-learning loop now actually fires. v1.4.0–v1.6.0 add a Laravel backend option (laravel-enterprise-backend on PostgreSQL+TimescaleDB, laravel-bref-deploy on AWS Lambda) + design-to-laravel (Claude Design → Laravel + Inertia React monolith), chosen via orchestrator backend- and frontend-stack gates. v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture + frontend-refactoring. Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas, exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning, superdev-done.
